name: Solfachord Solfegia
name_jp: ドレミコード・ソルフェージア
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
When your opponent's monster effect activated on the field resolves, if you control a "GranSolfachord" monster, you can negate that effect, then destroy this card. You can only use this effect of "Solfachord Solfegia" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If you control no monsters, or all monsters you control are "Solfachord" monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your Main Phase: You can activate this effect (you can also Tribute this card); Special Summon 1 "Solfachord" monster from your hand, except "Solfachord Solfegia", or, if you Tributed this card when you activated this effect, you can Special Summon from your face-up Extra Deck or GY instead. You can only use each effect of "Solfachord Solfegia" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
